scripts.build:all: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.build:backend: npm run build:shared && npm run build:services
scripts.build:services: cd backend/auth-service && npm run build && cd ../broker-service && npm run build && cd ../trade-service && npm run build && cd ../market-data-service && npm run build && cd ../analytics-service && npm run build
scripts.build:auth: npm run build:shared && cd backend/auth-service && npm run build
scripts.build:broker: npm run build:shared && cd backend/broker-service && npm run build
scripts.build:trade: npm run build:shared && cd backend/trade-service && npm run build
scripts.build:market: npm run build:shared && cd backend/market-data-service && npm run build
scripts.build:analytics: npm run build:shared && cd backend/analytics-service && npm run build
